creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #9)
The fontconfig package appears to be out of date.  The config.log contains the following error:
Package dependency requirement 'fontconfig >= 2.15.0' could not be satisfied.
Package 'fontconfig' has version '2.13.92', required version is '>= 2.15.0'
